privileged_info_summary: I have audited the configure_vehicle_sensors task in the Webots environment. The data is a synthetically crafted Webots world file ('av_scenario.wbt'). I confirmed through web search that the target Velodyne VLP-16 LIDAR hardware specifications explicitly match the required 16-layer (numberOfLayers=16) and 100-meter maximum range (maxRange=100) parameters. I verified that the initial state of the synthetic world has these parameters set to intentionally incorrect values (camera at 128x64, LIDAR with 4 layers and 20m range). I also confirmed that the verifier correctly validates these updated sensor properties (640x480 resolution for the 'front_camera', 16 layers and 100m range for 'velodyne_lidar') and checks the expected target output path '/home/ga/Desktop/av_sensors_configured.wbt'.
